core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Gallery Aesthetics with SaaS Functionality
Emotion First: Every interaction must feel 'created', not just 'rendered'
Content is King: The art is the hero, the UI is the frame
Negative Space: Luxurious padding to let art breathe

rules: Headings (H1-H2) must use 'Syne' for a modern art-gallery feel.
Body text must use 'Manrope' for high legibility in small sizes (messaging).
Use 'Cormorant Garamond' for editorial pull-quotes or artist statements.

usage_rules: Never use pure black (#000000). Use #0A0A0A or #121212.
Primary Action Color: Use 'Accent' sparingly (only for 'Send', 'Connect', 'Sign Up').
Text Contrast: Ensure WCAG AA compliance (4.5:1).
FORBIDDEN COLORS: Purple/Teal for CTA (Use defined Accent instead).

strategies.name: The Bento Grid (Discovery)
rules: Never fill 100% perfectly; leave negative space.

surface_styles.name: Glassmorphism (Crystal)
surface_styles.classes: bg-white/70 dark:bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/20 dark:border-white/10

surface_styles.name: Tracing Beam
surface_styles.description: A subtle gradient border that animates on hover.

inputs.base: bg-transparent border-b border-border focus:border-primary focus:outline-none px-0 py-2 rounded-none transition-colors
inputs.note: Use 'Underline' style inputs for a cleaner, less 'SaaS' look.

cards.base: group relative overflow-hidden rounded-xl border border-border/50 bg-card hover:border-accent/50 transition-colors duration-500

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. SETUP: Install fonts immediately via @import in index.css.
2. COMPONENTS: Use existing Shadcn components but STRIP the default 'radius-md' and 'border' styles. Make them 'Ghost' or 'Underline' styles to fit the Art aesthetic.
3. LANDING PAGE: Do NOT use a standard hero. Use an asymmetrical split or a full-screen immersive image with big bold typography.
4. DASHBOARD: Keep it dense (Mode B). Artists need to see messages and stats quickly.
5. IMAGES: Use the provided URLs for placeholders. Do not leave empty boxes.
6. MESSAGING: Implement the 'Glassmorphism' effect on the message bubbles (sent messages).
7. UNIVERSAL: Add data-testid to all interactive elements.
universal_guidelines: Do not center-align the app container.
